query: My partner and I are planning a 5-day trip from Munich to Vienna from July 10th to 14th, 2026. We have a total budget of €1,200. We enjoy visiting museums, trying local food, and exploring the city on foot. Please suggest accommodations and a daily itinerary.

slots.name: ÖBB Railjet Train (2 Adults)
slots.description: Direct high-speed train from Munich Hbf to Vienna Hbf for 2 adults. Book early for Sparschiene discounts.

slots.name: Rioca Vienna Posto 2 (4 Nights)
slots.description: 4 nights at Rioca Vienna Posto 2, a highly-rated and budget-friendly option.

slots.name: Walking Tour: Innere Stadt Courtyards
slots.description: Explore the hidden courtyards and medieval streets of Vienna's First District on foot.

slots.name: Dinner at Bauernbräu (2 Adults)
slots.description: Traditional Viennese dinner for 2 people.

slots.name: Naschmarkt & Secession (2 Adults)
slots.description: Visit the Naschmarkt and Secession building for 2 adults.

slots.name: Lunch at Naschmarkt (2 Adults)
slots.description: Sample various local foods at the market for 2.

slots.name: MuseumsQuartier (2 Adults)
slots.description: Explore the MuseumsQuartier for 2 adults.

slots.name: Dinner in Neubau (2 Adults)
slots.description: Dinner for 2 in the vibrant 7th district.

slots.name: Kunsthistorisches Museum (2 Adults)
slots.description: One of the world's foremost museums, housing Habsburg art collections. Tickets for 2 adults.

slots.name: Lunch (2 Adults)
slots.description: Lunch for 2 near Maria-Theresien-Platz.

slots.name: Breakfast (2 Adults)
slots.description: Quick breakfast for 2 at a local bakery.

slots.name: Sachertorte at Café Aida (2 Adults)
slots.description: Enjoy a slice of the famous chocolate cake for 2.

slots.name: Dinner at Figlmüller (2 Adults)
slots.description: Legendary plate-sized schnitzel for 2. Reservation mandatory.

slots.name: Belvedere Palace Combo (2 Adults)
slots.description: Combo ticket for Upper and Lower Belvedere for 2 adults. Includes Klimt's 'The Kiss'.

slots.name: Belvedere Gardens Walk
slots.description: Stroll through the beautiful Baroque gardens connecting the palaces.

slots.name: Lunch (2 Adults)
slots.description: Lunch for 2 in the Landstraße district.

slots.name: Dinner (2 Adults)
slots.description: Dinner for 2 at a local Gasthaus.

slots.name: Final City Walk
slots.description: Final walk through the city center.

slots.name: Farewell Lunch (2 Adults)
slots.description: Final Viennese lunch for 2.

slots.name: ÖBB Railjet to Munich (2 Adults)
slots.description: Return train to Munich for 2 adults.

validation_feedback: The itinerary is generally well-structured but has a few logical and thematic inconsistencies. 1. Please clarify the Day 3 schedule; it mentions 'Palaces & Gardens' in the header but the main activity is the Kunsthistorisches Museum (Art History). 2. Ensure that the transport cost of €40 for the ÖBB Railjet covers *both* adults as requested, or adjust the budget if that was a per-person estimate. 3. Consider adding Schönbrunn Palace to the 'Palaces' day as it is a top-rated attraction that fits the user's interest in walking and history. 4. Double-check the Day 3 timeline to ensure no overlapping activities.

task_list.name: transportation_munich_vienna
task_list.text: Find train or flight options from Munich to Vienna for July 10th and returning July 14th, 2026 for 2 people. Prioritize budget-friendly options like the OBB Railjet to preserve the €1,200 total budget.

task_list.name: vienna_accommodation
task_list.text: Search for accommodations in Vienna for 4 nights (July 10-14, 2026) for 2 adults with a total budget under €600 to allow for other expenses.

task_list.name: vienna_museums
task_list.text: Identify top-rated museums in Vienna, such as the Kunsthistorisches Museum or Belvedere, suitable for a 5-day trip.

task_list.name: vienna_walking_tours
task_list.text: Find scenic walking routes or pedestrian-friendly areas in Vienna's Innere Stadt and surrounding districts.

task_list.name: vienna_local_food
task_list.text: Find traditional Viennese restaurants and cafes offering local specialties like Schnitzel and Sachertorte within a moderate budget.

task_list.name: museum_hours_check
task_list.text: Verify the opening hours for major Vienna museums for the dates July 10-14, 2026.

task_list.name: itinerary_routing_check
task_list.text: Check the walking distances and transit times between selected museums, restaurants, and the city center to ensure a feasible daily itinerary.
